codeReview.summary: Reviewed commit 6264680 and the worker transcript skeleton. The implementation adds a background docker-compose log follower with `[vllm]` prefixing, case-insensitive CUDA error detection signaling via watch channel, stop-time task abort, and graceful stream-end handling. Behavior aligns with the feature description and expectedBehavior items.

summary: Feature implementation is consistent with requirements; no blocking or non-blocking defects were identified in the reviewed diff/transcript.
